# Onboarding: Mermaid Skill
Welcome to the mermaid skill! This guide helps you create, validate, and maintain diagrams in Markdown for docs and reviews.
## Quickstart Checklist
1. Read SKILL.md for diagram types and best practices.
2. Use tools in the tools/ directory (e.g. mermaid-cli) to render and validate diagrams.
3. See examples/README.md for copy-paste diagram patterns.
4. Integrate diagram validation into CI for docs.
## Troubleshooting
- **Diagram not rendering?**
- Check for syntax errors using mermaid-cli.
- Review GitHub rendering support for the diagram type.
## Resources
- [SKILL.md](SKILL.md): Diagram types and best practices.
- [examples/README.md](examples/README.md): Diagram patterns and CLI usage.
- [tools/mermaid-cli.txt](tools/mermaid-cli.txt): CLI validation and rendering.
